vulnerability.reference: Analysts assume flow-matching completely removes batch effects without verifying biological consistency
vulnerability.generated: Bioimage analysts lack automated manifold-conformity checks to detect morphologically implausible flow-matching outputs during batch correction.

impact.reference: Systematic errors from distorted images corrupt cross-study biological conclusions
impact.generated: Batch-normalized images carry hidden artifacts, generating spurious perturbation signals and misleading biological conclusions.

dose_response.reference: Straight-line flow matching producing implausible images enables bioimage analysts to inject artifacts in batch correction, leading to systematic errors and compromised reproducibility.
dose_response.generated: Straight-line flow matching interpolations deviating from the biological data manifold, when applied by bioimage analysts to normalize microscopy batches without automated manifold-conformity checks, produce implausible batch-normalized images with hidden artifacts, generating spurious perturbation signals and misleading biological conclusions.
